allow: Bash(cmd //c "wmic process where ProcessId=16544 get CommandLine /value 2>nul")

_note: robOS project-level hooks. Path-uri RELATIVE intentionat — `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` se expanda doar in bash; pe PowerShell/cmd ramane empty si node primeste `/scripts/...` care esueaza cu `C:\scripts\...`. Claude Code spawneaza hook-urile cu CWD=project root (vezi scripts/robos.js linia ~613 — `cd robos` cerinta explicita). Daca atingi paths aici, ruleaza `node scripts/smoke-hook-shell-resolve.js`.
